title: Ensure Block
description: Use the ensure keyword to run cleanup code regardless of whether an error occurred.
problemStatement:
Guaranteed run! In a `begin/rescue` block, add an `ensure` section that prints `"Always runs"`.

**Requirement:** The message should appear whether an error happens or not.
hints: `ensure` is perfect for closing files or clean-up tasks that must happen no matter what.
solutionCode:
begin
  # some code
rescue
  # handle error
ensure
  puts "Always runs"
end
